recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get caught in the rain?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left my umbrella in the lecture hall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you seen your new dorm yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: You'll love the study lounge in my dorm.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you stop by the writing center?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked when the writing center opens tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you do the reading for class?
recent_60_samples.answer: I didn't finish the reading assignment yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you checked the shuttle schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wonder whether the shuttle runs on Sundays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you learn anything about the museum?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the museum offers free tours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you choose your electives yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I picked the seminar that meets on Fridays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get the lecture slides?
recent_60_samples.answer: It's already posted on the course website.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you meet with your advisor?
recent_60_samples.answer: My advisor suggested a lighter course load this term.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You'll need to hand that form in by Friday.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I drop off the permission form?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you coming to soccer practice today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I twisted my ankle during practice today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you enjoy the campus fair yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: The food trucks were really great today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I think you dropped this in the hall.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where did you find my blue notebook?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your meeting with the dean go well?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether I had finished my application.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to the registrar today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I needed to know when the spring classes resume.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you skip dinner with us last night?
recent_60_samples.answer: I had not finished the long lab report.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard anything about your transfer credits?
recent_60_samples.answer: The advisor confirmed that the credits I submitted were finally approved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian tell you earlier?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the rare journals were moved to the basement archive.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm thinking about joining the photography club.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know when the members usually meet?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your advisor give you any useful advice today?
recent_60_samples.answer: She suggested the lighter elective that fills up before everyone registers.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you make it to your morning class?
recent_60_samples.answer: My alarm did not go off today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you grab a coffee before class?
recent_60_samples.answer: The campus cafe was already closed today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you ask the coach after tryouts?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the final roster had already been posted online.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you decided on a topic with your group?
recent_60_samples.answer: We picked the research subject that the panel recommended last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you arrive so late this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: My bus broke down near the bridge.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready for your big presentation?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not rehearsed the closing slides yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just moved into the north dorm.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I do my laundry around here?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear what happened to your housing form?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the form that I mailed last week got approved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check on the bike racks for me?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the racks behind the new gym were free.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the professor mention anything to you about Friday?
recent_60_samples.answer: The lecture has been moved to the larger hall downtown.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you free to grab coffee later today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I finish my last class at noon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sleep well before your big presentation?
recent_60_samples.answer: I woke up before my alarm rang.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard your group meeting got rescheduled.
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked if everyone could come on Thursday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to the new student at orientation?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether the labs that I booked are still open.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you turned in your scholarship paperwork?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't signed the second page yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just moved into the dorm this week.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I get a meal plan card?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you switch your morning section?
recent_60_samples.answer: The earlier lecture overlapped with my chemistry lab.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to your advisor about credits?
recent_60_samples.answer: She needed to know which of the courses I'd dropped would still count.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever get that library fine sorted out?
recent_60_samples.answer: The late fee was waived right after I'd explained the whole situation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you joining the photography club this term?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, I'm still comparing a few options.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you make it to the study session?
recent_60_samples.answer: I caught the shuttle right on time.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you want to visit the art gallery?
recent_60_samples.answer: It opens at ten on weekend mornings.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I keep losing track of the deadline.
recent_60_samples.answer: When's the final research draft actually due?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the front desk tell you?
recent_60_samples.answer: They've moved my package to the mailroom.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk things over with the dean today?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered whether the major that I'd picked still fit my plan.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever pick up your gym pass?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't stopped by the office yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I finally booked the volunteer orientation.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which room should I report to first?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard back about your housing form?
recent_60_samples.answer: The request that I submitted was finally approved this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your roommate say anything about the trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: He asked whether the bus leaves before dawn.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Margot want from the registrar?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked when the transcripts that I'd requested last week would be ready.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Olivia tell you about the study room?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed the last desk by the window.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Harold give you back your headphones?
recent_60_samples.answer: I still haven't gotten them back from him.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Mariana warn you about the seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: The seminar that I dropped met too late.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Hector's transcript come back wrong?
recent_60_samples.answer: The missing grade was corrected by the records office this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Margot mention the trip details to you?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know whether the vans leave early.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Emma tell you when the lab opens?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked if the lab opens before nine.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Julian ever find the book he lost?
recent_60_samples.answer: He found the notebook that went missing.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Matthew ask about the orientation?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know which building the new session was held in.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I keep comparing the two meal plans.
recent_60_samples.answer: The smaller plan costs less than the other one.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Juan send you the slides?
recent_60_samples.answer: I emailed him the slides last night.
